INTRO.CHARGE: Computer Engineer | Full Stack Developer | Cloud Architect
INTRO.DESCRIPTION: Over 2 years of experience building digital products from the database to the UI while maintaining efficient continuous integration. My work focuses on writing functional code and managing the underlying infrastructure.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Experience
EXPERIENCE.DESCRIPTION: My professional experience and work history are detailed here.

EXPERIENCES.TITLE: Backend Developer
EXPERIENCES.DESCRIPTION: Design and deployment of robust solutions based on Spring Boot and NoSQL, ensuring maintainable systems and stable continuous delivery processes through the application of best practices and layered architectures.
POINTS: Development of microservices with Spring Boot in a scalable architecture geared towards high availability.
Design and implementation of REST APIs, integrating NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis).
Application of Clean Architecture principles and layered architecture, improving system maintainability.
Implementation and management of CI/CD pipelines in GitLab, ensuring stable production deployments.
Use of best development practices (Git, branching, releases), optimizing collaboration and code quality.

EXPERIENCES.TITLE: Full Stack Developer
EXPERIENCES.DESCRIPTION: I designed robust full-stack solutions with a primary focus on backend scalability, database performance, and Linux infrastructure.
POINTS: Architected scalable backend services and RESTful APIs using Python and Flask, driving core system functionality and enabling seamless data integration across the platform.
Reduced query execution latency and improved data retrieval speeds by re-engineering SQL table schemas and implementing optimized stored procedures for high-volume datasets.
Ensured high availability in production by managing Enterprise Linux infrastructure and orchestrating resource-efficient virtualization using Proxmox and LXC containers.
Guaranteed deployment stability and minimized code conflicts by establishing Git branching strategies for controlled release management.
